title: MCIP IdeaAttribution v1
description: A claim that a specific LiteratureSource/ExternalClaim influenced (or explicitly did not influence) a specific proof variant. This is the central attribution record — distinct from a bare citation (ExternalClaim/LiteratureSource existing) by carrying attribution_status and visibility. Never changes kernel-verification status: this is child evidence about provenance, not proof authority.

formal_statement_sha256.description: Binds this attribution to the packet's statement, per the 'every attribution claim is bound to packet, statement, proof variant, and source hashes' acceptance criterion.

proof_variant_id.description: Which proof variant this attribution concerns, if variant-specific rather than whole-packet.

source_sha256_pin.description: Hash-pin of the referenced LiteratureSource.source_sha256 or RetrievedPassage.passage_sha256 at attribution time — the same hash-pin pattern as proof_variants[].restriction_profile_sha256. Detects drift if the underlying catalog entry changes.

visibility.description: model_visible: this source was available to/seen by the model during proof search (typically backed by a RetrievedPassage). post_hoc: discovered only during later review. This field is the structural mechanism keeping the two from being conflated.

dependency_refs.description: Links to theorem_deps / dependency_manifest ids, proof-profile features, or other research objects this attribution relates to.
